race.description: Commercial Hotel Swan Hill Vobis Gold Elvstroem Classic
race.comment: One of the big ones of the day and a race that has been the launching pad for a number of great careers. You get the feeling this has been a target race for MOUNTJOY (10), who hit the line well over 1000m on debut. Draws out a touch but will be suited by the big, long straight and the extra 300m. MAGICONI (4) was smashed in getting on debut and had his chance, only to find one better. Obviously talented and can go one better. TIFFANY (9) comes through the VOBIS Gold Rush at Bendigo, where she failed to place, but came from a long way back in a performance that suggested she's got talent. Finishing in front of TIFFANY at Bendigo was RUNNING RICH (3), who turned in a plucky effort to finish third and has won a trial since.
